hook.name: PriceImpactDynamicFeeHook
hook.description: A 2-state dynamic fee hook pinned to a single pool. In the DOWN state, non-owner swaps pay a base LP fee (default 2%); if a swap moves the sqrtPrice beyond a configurable threshold, the crank flips ON and subsequent non-owner swaps pay a fee cap (default 10%). Fee is applied as a beforeSwap LP fee override; the owner (tx.origin) pays 0% and can reset the crank via hookData.
